rationale: Qodo free-tier notice only; no code action requested.
resolve_github_credential_sync now uses the canonical async resolver from a private thread when called inside an active event loop, preserving direct env and SecretRef sources.
Token probe checklist statuses now reflect mode-specific endpoint evidence and report write permissions verified through read endpoints as verified_read_access rather than passed.
Review summary only; its two specific child findings are addressed separately.
Duplicate credential-source finding addressed by routing sync resolution through the canonical resolver even inside running event loops.
Probe checks now vary by mode: indexing no longer requires PR access, readiness probes PR/status/checks/issues evidence, and write requirements are not marked fully passed by read-only GET checks.
Codex review wrapper text only; its specific child findings are addressed separately.
